text:
Once upon a time, in an enchanted forest shrouded in misty perpetual twilight, there lived a curious squirrel named Poppy. She had a talent for discovering the hidden corners of the world.

One morning, Poppy discovered an old, weathered book hidden behind a gnarled oak tree. The book's cover was worn, telling tales of a legendary treasure hidden somewhere in the forest. Poppy fluttered her tiny wings a thousand times trying to decide whether to return it to its cozy nook or keep exploring this exciting mystery.

Intrigued, Poppy read about a clever golden mouse who found the treasure. With cautious steps and pawful careful turns, Poppy scuttled down the gnarled roots of the tree, peeked inside a secret compartment woven into the bark, and discovered silken threads woven with tiny golden glints.

The key to unlocking the treasure was said to be hidden deep within an ancient oak tree that stood alone. Poppy could hear a
